notes: Two-leg WTI/NZDCAD inverse-CAD return-spread reversion basket from the approved EIA-BOC-RBNZ-XTI-NZDCAD-2026 card. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute a standardized log-return spread over a fixed lookback. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not the standalone legs.
